items.title_en: Google Cloud CEO Kurian says customers are spending 50% more as segment blows away expectations
items.title_zh: 谷歌云首席执行官 Kurian 表示，由于细分市场超出预期，客户的支出增加了 50%
items.desc_en: Google Cloud CEO Thomas Kurian told CNBC on Thursday that the company's existing customers are spending "roughly 50% more" than they've already committed.
items.desc_zh: 谷歌云首席执行官托马斯·库里安 (Thomas Kurian) 周四向 CNBC 表示，该公司现有客户的支出比他们已经承诺的“多出大约 50%”。

items.title_en: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
items.title_zh: 油价自5月以来首次触及100美元
items.desc_en: The price of Brent crude rose more than 5% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.
items.desc_zh: 随着中东战事持续升级，布伦特原油价格周四上涨逾5%。

items.title_en: Cyclospora outbreak tests RFK Jr.'s promise to overhaul food system, rebuild trust in CDC
items.title_zh: 环孢菌爆发考验 RFK Jr. 改革食品系统、重建对 CDC 信任的承诺
items.desc_en: Cyclospora presents a test for HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s promise to overhaul the food system and restore confidence in the agencies overseeing it.
items.desc_zh: 环孢菌对美国卫生与公众服务部部长小罗伯特·F·肯尼迪承诺彻底改革食品系统并恢复人们对食品系统监管机构的信心提出了考验。

items.title_en: Tesla gets price target cuts from analysts on earnings miss. What they're saying
items.title_zh: 特斯拉因盈利未达标而被分析师下调目标价。他们在说什么
items.desc_en: Tesla underwhelmed Wall Street with its latest financial results, leading some analysts to lower their price targets on shares.
items.desc_zh: 特斯拉最新的财务业绩令华尔街失望，导致一些分析师下调了股价目标。

items.title_en: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，沙特必须承认以色列的核协议
items.desc_en: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，帮助沙特发展核能的里程碑式协议取决于其加入《亚伯拉罕协议》。

items.title_en: Dow tumbles 500 points as Brent crude tops $100, Alphabet and Tesla drop: Live updates
items.title_zh: 布伦特原油突破 100 美元，Alphabet 和特斯拉下跌：实时更新，道指暴跌 500 点
items.desc_en: U.S. equities fell on Thursday, as oil prices surged amid escalating conflict in the Middle East.
items.desc_zh: 由于中东冲突升级，油价飙升，美国股市周四下跌。

items.title_en: Tech reporter Joanna Stern asked AI to do 'almost everything' for a year—the No. 1 tool she'll keep using
items.title_zh: 科技记者乔安娜·斯特恩 (Joanna Stern) 要求人工智能在一年内完成“几乎所有事情”——这是她将继续使用的第一大工具
items.desc_en: "I Am Not a Robot" author Joanna Stern integrated dozens of AI applications into her life over the course of a year. She says this one has stuck with her.
items.desc_zh: 《我不是机器人》的作者乔安娜·斯特恩在一年的时间里将数十种人工智能应用融入到她的生活中。她说这件事一直困扰着她。

items.title_en: 10-year Treasury yield rises to highest since January 2025 as surging oil rekindles inflation fear
items.title_zh: 油价飙升重燃通胀担忧 10年期国债收益率升至2025年1月以来最高
items.desc_en: U.S. Treasury yields climbed on Wednesday, following oil prices higher, as traders also reacted to a slump in weekly claims for unemployment insurance.
items.desc_zh: 随着油价走高，美国国债收益率周三攀升，交易员也对每周失业保险申请人数下降做出反应。

items.title_en: Google fined €890m by EU for favouring its own apps over rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因偏爱自己的应用而不是竞争对手而被欧盟罚款 8.9 亿欧元
items.desc_en: It is the first major enforcement action against the tech giant under the EU's new digital rules.
items.desc_zh: 这是欧盟新数字规则下针对这家科技巨头的首次重大执法行动。

items.desc_en: Permission-first real-time senses for AI companions
items.desc_zh: 为人工智能伴侣提供许可优先的实时感知

items.title_en: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
items.title_zh: 加拿大“强大”的乳制品行业成为特朗普的贸易瞄准目标
items.desc_en: Canada's dairy supply management system is in the spotlight after the US president singled it out as one of three main irritants used to justify new tariffs.
items.desc_zh: 在美国总统将加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统列为证明新关税合理性的三大主要刺激因素之一后，加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统成为人们关注的焦点。

items.title_en: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯企业因乌克兰对野莓的袭击而承受压力
items.desc_en: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰无人机在几天内袭击了俄罗斯最大在线零售商 Wildberry 旗下的多个零售仓库。

items.title_en: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
items.title_zh: 谷歌因人工智能成本不断上升而烧钱
items.desc_en: The company said earlier this year it expected to spend as much as $190bn on AI investments.
items.desc_zh: 该公司今年早些时候表示，预计将在人工智能投资上花费高达 1900 亿美元。

items.title_en: OpenCode Superapp
items.title_zh: OpenCode Superapp
items.desc_en: The power of Codex with local, self-hosted models and voice
items.desc_zh: Codex 具有本地自托管模型和语音的强大功能

items.title_en: NotifyBridge
items.title_zh: NotifyBridge
items.desc_en: Dead-Simple IoT Push Notifications for Makers & Hobbyists
items.desc_zh: 为创客和爱好者提供极其简单的物联网推送通知

items.title_en: Fire kills 10 members of same family in Peru, police say
items.title_zh: 秘鲁警方称火灾导致同一家庭10名成员死亡
items.desc_en:
Authorities are investigating the cause of the blaze in Lima as local media report
 it may have been arson.
items.desc_zh:
据当地媒体报道，当局正在调查利马火灾的原因
 这可能是纵火案。

items.title_en: Basedash AI Kit
items.title_zh: Basedash AI Kit
items.desc_en: Ship AI analytics in your product, powered by GPT-5.6
items.desc_zh: 由 GPT-5.6 提供支持，在您的产品中提供 AI 分析

items.title_en: Teenager drops social media addiction lawsuit against Meta
items.title_zh: 青少年放弃对 Meta 的社交媒体成瘾诉讼
items.desc_en: Claims from a 15-year-old boy were set to go to trial next week in Los Angeles, but the case has now been dropped.
items.desc_zh: 一名 15 岁男孩的索赔原定于下周在洛杉矶接受审判，但此案现已被撤销。

items.title_en: Model recruiter who introduced young women to Jeffrey Epstein found dead in France - ABC7 New York
items.title_zh: 向杰弗里·爱泼斯坦介绍年轻女性的模特招聘人员在法国被发现死亡 - ABC7 New York
items.desc_en: Model recruiter who introduced young women to Jeffrey Epstein found dead in France  ABC7 New YorkSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News
items.desc_zh: 向年轻女性介绍杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 的模特招聘人员在法国被发现身亡 ABC7 纽约在 Google 新闻上查看更多头条新闻和观点

items.title_en: Mamdani backs off pledge to arrest Netanyahu citing lack of authority
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼以缺乏权威为由放弃逮捕内塔尼亚胡的承诺
items.desc_en: The New York City mayor instead called on US authorities to act on International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.
items.desc_zh: 相反，纽约市市长呼吁美国当局根据国际刑事法院对以色列总理的逮捕令采取行动。

items.title_en: Wispro
items.title_zh: Wispro
items.desc_en: Stop typing, start talking, get perfectly written text
items.desc_zh: 停止打字，开始说话，获得完美的书写文本

items.title_en: Wreckage of Pan Am plane that shaped aviation safety found 74 years on
items.title_zh: 74 年前影响航空安全的泛美航空飞机残骸被发现
items.desc_en: The deaths of 52 people on the Clipper Endeavor led to the introduction of mandatory pre-flight safety briefings.
items.desc_zh: 奋进号快船 52 人死亡导致强制飞行前安全简报的出台。

items.title_en: OpenAI says its AI went rogue and launched 'unprecedented' cyber-attack
items.title_zh: OpenAI 称其人工智能失控并发起“前所未有”的网络攻击
items.desc_en: It is one of the first publicly disclosed cyber-attacks carried out by AI without direct human involvement.
items.desc_zh: 这是首次公开披露的由人工智能在没有人类直接参与的情况下实施的网络攻击之一。

items.desc_zh: Logitech MX 键盘上 Codex CLI 的任务控制

items.desc_zh: 尽可能快地构建和发送报价

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.desc_en: See live signals from the Pacific warming climate
items.desc_zh: 查看太平洋气候变暖的实时信号

items.desc_en: AI-native motion graphics editor
items.desc_zh: AI原生动态图形编辑器

items.title_en: AI minister role boosted but tech department axed in Burnham shake-up
items.title_zh: 伯纳姆改组中人工智能部长职位得到提升，但技术部门被削减
items.desc_en: Kanishka Narayan will attend cabinet - but no longer have the leadership of a technology secretary.
items.desc_zh: 卡尼什卡·纳拉扬 (Kanishka Narayan) 将出席内阁会议，但不再拥有技术部长的领导权。

items.title_en: AskCodi
items.title_zh: AskCodi
items.desc_en: Orchestrate agents at scale while reducing cost
items.desc_zh: 大规模协调代理同时降低成本

items.title_en: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站
items.desc_en: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.
items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.title_en: Moxie Docs: Knowledgebases
items.title_zh: Moxie Docs: Knowledgebases
items.desc_en: Automated documentation for developers, users, and AI Tools
items.desc_zh: 面向开发人员、用户和 AI 工具的自动化文档

items.desc_en: Windows clipboard history that searches inside screenshots
items.desc_zh: 在屏幕截图中搜索的 Windows 剪贴板历史记录

items.title_en: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_en: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_en: Basement
items.title_zh: Basement
items.desc_en: Shopping browser with agentic checkout
items.desc_zh: 具有代理结账功能的购物浏览器

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.desc_en: Surgeons remotely control two human-like robots in an operating theatre.
items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。
